logo_description: Adidas has two logo variants: (1) the Three Stripes — three parallel diagonal or vertical stripes on the side of shoes, legs of shorts or pants, and sleeves of apparel, always in a single contrasting color against the garment; (2) the Trefoil — three leaf-shaped lobes arranged in a triangle meeting at a central stem, used on lifestyle and Originals products. The word ADIDAS often appears in bold uppercase sans-serif letters. Three Stripes appear prominently on the sides of sneakers and running shoes, and as racing stripes down sportswear sleeves and legs.
prohibited_contexts: competitor brand logos or products (Nike, Puma, Reebok, Under Armour, New Balance)
